message:
Fix string concatenation memory leaks

Eliminated memory leaks in string concatenation through:
1. Flattening nested concat chains into single operation
2. Adding defer cleanup for allocated strings

Changes:
- expressions.zig: Added collectConcatParts() to flatten (s1 + " ") + s2 → [s1, " ", s2]
- assign.zig: Detect string concat, add defer allocator.free()
- misc.zig: Wrap print concat args in block with defer cleanup

Before: s1 + " " + s2 generated nested concat with 2 leaks
After: Single concat call with defer free, zero leaks

Test results: 28 → 30 passing (+2 tests)
